mnemonics: ARIMA: Always Remember I (p) Must Analyze (d,q) - ARIMA(p,d,q) stands for Autoregressive (p) Integrated (d) Moving Average (q)
keyPoints: Stationarity is a fundamental assumption for many time series models; check it first.
The Autocorrelation Function (ACF) and Partial Autocorrelation Function (PACF) are key for identifying AR and MA processes.
Model diagnostics (e.g., checking residuals for autocorrelation) are crucial to validate a fitted model.
commonMistakes: Using a non-stationary time series directly in an ARIMA model without differencing (d>0).
Overfitting the model by adding unnecessary AR or MA terms without statistical justification.
Confusing the interpretation of the ACF and PACF plots for model identification.
